name: TIP
intro: does, however, provide a lot of flavor.
method: Place the carrots, zucchini, and garlic into a food processor and purée until smooth. Add the almond pulp, ground flaxseed, and curry powder. Using a kitchen spoon or wire whisk, combine all the ingredients well, making sure that there are no lumps. Season to taste.
1 cup almond pulp (see tip, p.45 and p.143)
1 tsp mild curry powder salt and freshly ground black pepper
Spread the mixture on the dehydrating trays
⁄4in (5mm) thick. Dry in the food dehydrator for
4–5 hours at 104°F (40°C). After the time is up, test to see whether the crispbread is hard enough to turn over. If it is not, dry it for
⁄2–1 hour more. Test the crispbread again, turn it over, and leave it on the trays to dry completely. Before serving, carefully break the crispbread into large pieces.
